headline: Texas Instruments Stock: Is TXN Outperforming the Technology Sector?
summary: Texas Instruments has delivered stronger returns than the broader technology sector over the past year, and analysts remain moderately bullish on the stock's future performance.

headline: Synopsys: Why The Consolidation Phase May Be Ending
summary: Synopsys, Inc. gets upgraded to Buy after breaking consolidation. Click for this updated look at SNPS and see why I am upgrading the stock after earnings.

headline: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: Micron Technologies, Sandisk, Vishay Intertechnology, ON Semiconductor, Texas Instruments and Analog Devices
summary: Vishay Intertechnology has surged nearly 200% in two months as rising orders, backlog growth and AI-linked demand fuel the analog chip recovery.

headline: BofA Raises its Price Target on Texas Instruments (TXN)
summary: Texas Instruments Incorporated (NASDAQ:TXN) is one of the 12 Most Profitable Stocks to Invest In. On May 25, 2026, BofA raised the firm’s price target on Texas Instruments Incorporated (NASDAQ:TXN) to $370 from $320 and maintained a Buy rating on the shares. BofA said the company’s multi-year content gains still appear underappreciated, while its core […]
